channel.title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily
channel.description: A daily podcast covering the latest Tesla news, stock prices, and industry insights.
channel.itunes:author: Patrick
channel.itunes:summary: A daily podcast covering the latest Tesla news, stock prices, and industry insights.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time - Episode 412 - February 23, 2026
item.description:
# Tesla Shorts Time **Date:** February 23, 2026 **REAL-TIME TSLA price:** $411.82 ▲ $0.57 (0.1%)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 10 News Items 1. **Tesla hiring for Commercial Charging role hints at Semi push in Europe: 22 February, 2026, 11:30 PM PST, Teslarati** Tesla has posted a job opening for a Commercial Charging role, signaling a potential expansion of its Semi truck initiative into Europe. This move could accelerate Tesla's presence in the commercial EV sector, tapping into Europe's gr...
item.itunes:summary:
# Tesla Shorts Time **Date:** February 23, 2026 **REAL-TIME TSLA price:** $411.82 ▲ $0.57 (0.1%)

This move could accelerate Tesla's presence in the commercial EV sector, tapping into Europe's gr...
item.itunes:title: Tesla Shorts Time - Episode 412 - February 23, 2026

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time - Episode 410 - February 21, 2026
item.description:
# Tesla Shorts Time **Date:** February 21, 2026 **REAL-TIME TSLA price:** $411.82 ▲ $0.41 (0.1%)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 10 News Items 1. **Tesla Details AI4 Chip with Failover Redundancy: 20 February, 2026, 9:16 PM PST, WhatsUpTesla** Tesla has unveiled details on its AI4 chip, featuring full failover redundancy where two computers run in parallel and monitor each other for instant takeover if issues arise. This technology enhances reliability for Full Self-Driving (FSD) in vehicles an...

# Tesla Shorts Time **Date:** February 21, 2026 **REAL-TIME TSLA price:** $411.82 ▲ $0.41 (0.1%)

This technology enhances reliability for Full Self-Driving (FSD) in vehicles an...

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time - Episode 408 - February 19, 2026
item.description:
# Tesla Shorts Time **Date:** February 19, 2026 **REAL-TIME TSLA price:** $411.32 ▲ $1.05 (0.3%)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 10 News Items 1. **Tesla owners surpass 8 billion miles driven on FSD Supervised: 19 February, 2026, 1:24 AM PST, Teslarati** Tesla has announced that its owners have collectively driven over 8 billion miles using the Full Self-Driving Supervised system, marking a significant milestone as adoption ramps up in multiple markets. This achievement highlights the rapid acc...

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time - Episode 406 - February 17, 2026
item.description:
# Tesla Shorts Time **Date:** February 17, 2026 **REAL-TIME TSLA price:** $417.44 ▲ $0.00 (0.0%)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 10 News Items 1. **Chinese Robots Perform in Front of 1 Billion People: 17 February, 2026, 2:39 AM PST, WebProNews** Chinese robots showcased impressive dexterity in a performance viewed by over a billion people, highlighting advancements that could challenge Tesla's Optimus robot upon its launch. While these robots are pre-programmed, Optimus's AI brain allows for le...

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time - Episode 405 - February 16, 2026
item.description:
# Tesla Shorts Time **Date:** February 16, 2026 **REAL-TIME TSLA price:** $417.44 ▲ $1.11 (0.3%)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 10 News Items 1. **Tesla rolls out xAI’s Grok to vehicles across Europe — 15 February, 2026, 11:56 PM PST, Teslarati** Tesla has begun deploying xAI's Grok AI assistant to its vehicles in several European countries, starting with the UK, Ireland, Germany, and others. This move enhances the in-car experience with advanced AI capabilities, potentially boosting Tesla's a...

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time - Episode 407 - February 18, 2026
item.description:
# Tesla Shorts Time **Date:** February 18, 2026 **REAL-TIME TSLA price:** $410.63 ▲ $1.50 (0.4%)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 10 News Items 1. **Tesla won’t use the term ‘Autopilot’ in California anymore: 18 February, 2026, 2:21 AM PST, The Verge** Tesla has stopped using the "Autopilot" term for its self-driving features in California to comply with state regulations after the DMV found the marketing misleading. This change avoids a potential 30-day sales suspension and highlights ongoing s...
